summary: Completed HappyCo Concierge final demo stabilization testing. Key findings: Login stability works 100% for all 3 roles, demo banners correctly appear only for unsupported actions (Deploy Intervention), ResidentConcierge component builds successfully after syntax fix, but session management and navigation stability need attention.

ui_bugs.issue: Sessions expire quickly during navigation, causing frequent redirects to login page

integration_issues.issue: Navigation to AI Concierge page inconsistent, sometimes requires multiple attempts or 'Start Chat' click
Deploy Intervention correctly shows demo banner, but may require navigation to Alex Chen details first

passed_tests: Login stability for all 3 roles (Admin, Manager, Resident) - 100% success rate
No unwanted demo banners on normal page loads (dashboard, navigation)
Demo banner correctly appears for Deploy Intervention (unsupported action)
Frontend builds successfully after syntax error fix in ResidentConcierge.jsx
All role dashboards load cleanly without errors
Sign out functionality works for all roles
ResidentConcierge component structure and data-testid attributes are properly implemented
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Investigate session management - sessions expire too quickly during testing, causing navigation issues. 2. Ensure ResidentConcierge page routing is more reliable - sometimes requires Start Chat button click. 3. Test Deploy Intervention flow manually to confirm demo banner functionality. 4. The syntax error in ResidentConcierge.jsx line 20 has been fixed (template literal quote issue).
